name: reset_from_parent
description:
Reset a branch to its parent's current state, discarding all changes made on the branch. NEVER run autonomously; always ask the user first. Use `preserveUnderName` to preserve the current state under a new branch name before resetting.

<notice>
Notice: Write mode active. Destructive tools are exposed. For tools with `destructiveHint: true`, NEVER invoke autonomously; always ask the user first.
</notice>

projectId.description: The ID of the project containing the branch

branchIdOrName.description: The name or ID of the branch to reset from its parent

preserveUnderName.description: Optional name to preserve the current state under a new branch before resetting
